steps.title: Attach the modifying phrase
steps.content: The quoted definition ends with the word "soul." The phrase after the blank, "positing that all life's virtues derived from this absence," is a supplemental participial phrase, not a complete new sentence.

steps.title: Avoid fragment punctuation
steps.content: B uses a colon before a phrase that does not introduce a complete explanation. C uses a semicolon even though the following words are not an independent clause. D makes the following participial phrase a fragment. A comma connects the phrase correctly. The answer is A.
